name: modelbit

metadata.name: modelbit
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Modelbit helps you rapidly deploy and manage ML models with modern MLOps features.

documentation:
Modelbit helps you rapidly deploy and manage ML models with modern MLOps features.

Learn more and sign up at modelbit.com.

classes.name: modelbit.keras_wrapper.KerasWrapper

class_variables.name: modelbit.keras_wrapper.KerasWrapper.saveFormat
documentation: default, maybe "keras" will work soon. That might also remove the need for this custom code
Keras doesn't pickle well on Windows/Mac. This wrapper saves/loads it from a file format that does work cross-OS

classes.name: modelbit.helpers.InstancePickleWrapper
documentation: For instances of user defined classes. Default Pickle doesn't handle unpickling user defined
classes because they cannot be imported, since they're defined in the notebook

functions.name: modelbit.utils.getSerializerDesc
documentation: We use the pip install format to show users what version of the serializer was used

functions.name: modelbit.utils.tempFilePath
documentation: self-removing temp file path, for when using a handle isn't an option

functions.name: modelbit.utils.storeFileOnSuccess
documentation: Stores encrypted content into local cache so it doesn't need to be downloaded later

variables.name: modelbit.file_logging.PngThresholdBytes
documentation: use png for clearer image if smaller than this

modules.name: modelbit.cli.describe
documentation: These were moved from the cli package.
They are referenced in old versions of modelbit_job_helper.py
Keep for back-compat until it is clear they are not needed.

modules.name: modelbit.cli.filter
documentation: These were moved from the cli package.
They are referenced in old versions of modelbit_job_helper.py
Keep for back-compat until it is clear they are not needed.

functions.name: modelbit.collect_dependencies.getClassSourceFromJupyterCache
documentation: This'll work some of the time. See https://gitlab.com/modelbit/modelbit/-/issues/893

variables.name: modelbit.collect_dependencies.MAX_LIST_ITEMS_TO_CHECK
documentation: if users send us a giant list we assume the items are all roughly the same

functions.name: modelbit.runtime._parseTimeFromDeployMessage
documentation: a bit of a hack for now

functions.name: modelbit.runtime.add_objects
documentation:
add_object takes the name of a deployment and map of object names to objects.
These objects will be pickled and stored in `data/object.pkl`
and can be read using modelbit.load_value('data/object.pkl).

functions.name: modelbit.runtime.add_files
documentation:
add_files takes the name of a deployment and either a list of files or
a dict of local paths to deployment paths.
modelbit_file_prefix is an optional folder prefix added to all files when uploaded. For example (deployment="score", files=['myModel.pkl'], modelbit_file_prefix="data")
would upload myModel.pkl in the current directory to data/myModel.pkl in the deployment named score.

functions.name: modelbit.api.inference_api.breakIntoChunks
documentation: yields chunks instead of processing all the chunks because chunking can take a while on very large item lists

functions.name: modelbit.internal.package._buildViaSdist
documentation: We build via sdist to ensure the wheel is built clean

methods.name: modelbit.internal.package.PackageBuilder._getWheelRecordHash
documentation: The name of the .dist-info file may not be normalized, but we often only know the normalized name. So
we search for the record file instead of looking it up by name

functions.name: modelbit.internal.s3._downloadDecryptRuntimeObject
documentation: We store the decrypted version in deployment's cache

modules.name: modelbit.internal.s3_stream
documentation: This file is duplicated between the modelbit package and the runtime environment. Only import from stdlib since other
files might not be available in that environment.

variables.name: modelbit.internal.runtime_objects.MAX_FOUND_FILES
documentation: prevent mistakes where folks upload a zillion files by accident

functions.name: modelbit.internal.encryption._makeCipher
documentation: Cipher is stateful, so we need to make new ones for each read operation

classes.name: modelbit.git.git_protocol.GitProtocolBase
documentation:
Implements git-protocol. To aid debugging export GIT_TRACE_PACKET=1
Roughly, a packet-based protocol. Each packet starts with 4 hex digits specifying
the length.
https://github.com/git/git/blob/master/Documentation/gitprotocol-common.txt

functions.name: modelbit.git.validations.collectMetadataFiles
documentation: returns filePath -> fileContents. Getting them all so they can be in one web request

methods.name: modelbit.setup_manager.StoredSetup.varIsDefinedWithin
documentation: See #2121. We're trying to tell the difference between variables assigned in the block and those only referenced in the block

functions.name: modelbit.environment.scrubUnwantedPackages
documentation: Mostly to prevent adding packages that were installed with git and now have a foo==bar name

functions.name: modelbit.environment.orderPackages
documentation: Some packages need to be installed after other packages
